zh.lifeSummary: 當Brian de Staunton於1027年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親Mauger De Staunton28歲，母親Anne De Staunton22歲。他於1069年與Emma Staunton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1076年在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Brian de Staunton于1027年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，他的父亲Mauger De Staunton28岁，母亲Anne De Staunton22岁。他于1069年与Emma Staunton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾內瓦可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1076年在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Brian de Staunton was born in 1027, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Mauger De Staunton, was 28 and his mother, Anne De Staunton, was 22. He married Emma Staunton in 1069, in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1076, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Brian de Staunton est né en 1027, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mauger De Staunton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anne De Staunton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma Staunton en 1069, à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1076, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Brian de Staunton 1027 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mauger De Staunton 28 und seine Mutter Anne De Staunton 22. Er hat 1069 in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Emma Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1076 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Brian de Staunton è nato il nel 1027 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Mauger De Staunton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anne De Staunton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma Staunton nel 1069, nel Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1076, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Brian de Stauntonが1027年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父Mauger De Stauntonは28歳，母Anne De Stauntonは22歳であった。1069年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアニューアルクでEmma Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1076年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Brian de Staunton(이)가 1027년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mauger De Staunton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne De Staunton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1069년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에서 Emma Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1076년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Brian de Staunton nasceu em 1027, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mauger De Staunton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anne De Staunton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Staunton em 1069, em Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1076, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Brian de Staunton родился в 1027 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mauger De Staunton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne De Staunton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Staunton в 1069 г. в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1076 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Brian de Staunton nació en 1027, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Mauger De Staunton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anne De Staunton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Emma Staunton en 1069, en Newark, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1076, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
